creator: ger.rrgllc@gmail.com
text:
Hardware: Toshiba Satellite Pro 6100, BIOS Ver. 1.90 (25 Jul 2003)

System running custom kernel w/o APM or USB devices suspends properly with
"acpiconf -s S3" command.
Upon resume with Power button actuation, kernel reports:
   g_vfs_done():ad0s2a[READ(offset=3698522112, length=2048)]error = 6
to the text console, followed by:
   panic: vinvalbuf: dirty bufs
and the system "crashes".
